version: 1; Last updated: 2025-06-10 19:04:47+0000;

Information Source: #zOBHLc4oJjsM2fkp

Structure
LinkIDTextCardinalityTypeFlagsDescription & Constraints
ZBI-22Zarit Burden Interview (ZBI) Questionnairehttps://globalalliantinc.com/fhir/questionnaires/ZBI-22#1.0.0
mbiWhat is this patient's Medicare Beneficiary Identifier (MBI)?1..1string
first_nameWhat is the patient's first name?1..1stringMax Length: 100
last_nameWhat is the patient's last name?1..1stringMax Length: 100
date_of_birthWhat is this patient's date of birth?1..1date
pcg_first_nameWhat is the primary caregiver's first name?1..1stringMax Length: 100
pcg_last_nameWhat is the primary caregiver's last name?1..1stringMax Length: 100
assessment_datePlease report the date this assessment was complete.1..1date
ask_moreDo you feel that your relative asks for more help than he/she needs?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
enough_timeDo you feel that because of the time you spend with your relative that you don't have enough time for yourself?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
stressedDo you feel stressed between caring for your relative and trying to meet other responsibilities for your family or work?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
embarrassedDo you feel embarrassed over your relative's behavior?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
angryDo you feel angry when you are around your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
affects_relationshipsDo you feel that your relative currently affects your relationship with other family members or friends in a negative way?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
afraid_futureAre you afraid what the future holds for your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
dependentDo you feel your relative is dependent upon you?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
strainedDo you feel strained when you are around your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
health_sufferedDo you feel your health has suffered because of your involvement with your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
privacyDo you feel that you don't have as much privacy as you would like, because of your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
social_lifeDo you feel that your social life has suffered because you are caring for your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
uncomfortableDo you feel uncomfortable about having friends over, because of your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
expectationDo you feel that your relative seems to expect you to take care of him/her, as if you were the only one he/she could depend on?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
enough_moneyDo you feel that you don't have enough money to care for your relative, in addition to the rest of your expenses?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
much_longerDo you feel that you will be unable to take care of your relative much longer?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
lost_controlDo you feel you have lost control of your life since your relative's illness?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
leave_careDo you wish you could just leave the care of your relative to someone else?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
uncertainDo you feel uncertain about what to do about your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
do_moreDo you feel you should be doing more for your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
better_jobDo you feel you could do a better job in caring for your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options
overall_burdenOverall, how burdened do you feel in caring for your relative?1..1choiceOptions: 5 options

resource.name: ZBI-22
resource.title: ZBI-22
resource.purpose: The ZBI-22 uses a scale of 0-4 to gauge the  degree of burden Primary Caregivers experience related to the demands of providing daily care  to a dependent adult.

item.text: What is this patient's Medicare Beneficiary Identifier (MBI)?
What is the patient's first name?
What is the patient's last name?
What is this patient's date of birth?
What is the primary caregiver's first name?
What is the primary caregiver's last name?
Please report the date this assessment was complete.
Do you feel that your relative asks for more help than he/she needs?
Do you feel that because of the time you spend with your relative that you don't have enough time for yourself?
Do you feel stressed between caring for your relative and trying to meet other responsibilities for your family or work?
Do you feel embarrassed over your relative's behavior?
Do you feel angry when you are around your relative?
Do you feel that your relative currently affects your relationship with other family members or friends in a negative way?
Are you afraid what the future holds for your relative?
Do you feel your relative is dependent upon you?
Do you feel strained when you are around your relative?
Do you feel your health has suffered because of your involvement with your relative?
Do you feel that you don't have as much privacy as you would like, because of your relative?
Do you feel that your social life has suffered because you are caring for your relative?
Do you feel uncomfortable about having friends over, because of your relative?
Do you feel that your relative seems to expect you to take care of him/her, as if you were the only one he/she could depend on?
Do you feel that you don't have enough money to care for your relative, in addition to the rest of your expenses?
Do you feel that you will be unable to take care of your relative much longer?
Do you feel you have lost control of your life since your relative's illness?
Do you wish you could just leave the care of your relative to someone else?
Do you feel uncertain about what to do about your relative?
Do you feel you should be doing more for your relative?
Do you feel you could do a better job in caring for your relative?
Overall, how burdened do you feel in caring for your relative?
